CAPA-2026-0341.content: Place affected batches VAC-26-0518-A and VAC-26-0518-B on QA hold until EM trend and batch exposure assessment are complete.
Restrict Grade A Fill Suite use until HEPA-FF-L2-07 airflow verification passes.

CAPA-2026-0089.content: Quarantine the affected material transfer records from release decision use until QA reconciliation is complete.

CAPA-2026-0112.content: Quarantine the returned complaint sample and place retained samples from VAC-26-0419-C under QA review.
